note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left plantar wound site, rates 3/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Left plantar measures 2.8 cm x 3.8 cm x 1.4 cm.
  Wound bed: 46% slough, 54% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: none. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Left plantar — improving.
Plan: Offloading boot applied. Alginate dressing applied.

Pt seen for wound eval. Diabetic Left plantar measures aprx 2.8 x 3.8cm, depth 1.4cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - L heel 1.7x2.3, 0.7cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Mon.
